fixtures.prompt: Build a team centered around Mega Froslass using Snow Warning and Aurora Veil. Give me the full 6-Pokemon roster with items, abilities, moves, SP spreads, and natures.
Build a rain team around Pelipper. I want Swift Swim abusers.
Build a sun team with Torkoal + Venusaur core.
Build a Sand Rush team around Tyranitar + Excadrill.
Build a hard Trick Room team with strong TR setters and slow hitters.
Build a Tailwind offense team with a Mega of your choice.
I keep losing to Incineroar-heavy teams. Build me something that punishes Incineroar.
Build me a balanced goodstuffs team with Dragonite as the Mega.
Build a trapper team around Mega Gengar's Shadow Tag.
Azumarill is the highest WR Pokemon in the meta. Build a team around it.
